Utility)
testbasec
TestProcessRestartc
superr
myinitZ
_start_ovsZ
_start_netagent)
self
	__class__
D/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/na_tests/ft/test_process_restart.pyr
TestProcessRestart.myinitc
Na$	
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.2.3.3"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip=1.2.3.3
na-ctl wait --id=1
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.4,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl time/warp 100
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
pid1=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
kill $pid1
sleep 1
ovs-vswitchd --enable-dummy=override --disable-system --detach --no-chdir --pidfile --log-file -vvconn -vofproto_dpif -vunixctl
sleep 1
pid2=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
if test $pid1 -eq $pid2; then
    exit 2
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl time/warp 2000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.4,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'actions:drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl time/warp 2000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.3,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows2.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 4
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:bind-ip"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config bind-ip
na-ctl wait --id=1
ovs-appctl revalidator/purge
ovs-appctl time/warp 2000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 'in_port(1),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0c,dst=50:54:00:00:00:05),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=1.2.3.4,dst=1.2.3.5,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)'
ovs-appctl dpif/dump-flows br0 > br0_flows3.txt
grep 'actions:2' br0_flows3.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 5
test_dirTr
z1test restart bind ip failed: shell return code:%d)
cmd_execute
format
	_test_dir
assertEqual
retr
test_restart_bindip
<z&TestProcessRestart.test_restart_bindipc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
acl_by_add_icmp_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='acl_config' chain='root'>
  <uuid>54ba2e43-a4c2-44e1-be3c-134034983232</uuid>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='5' statematch='false'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='in' priority='6' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='7' statematch='false'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='false'>
    <tcp dstipaddr='1.2.3.6' dstipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
acl_by_add_icmp_default > {nwfilterdir}/{aclconfig}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclconfig}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={aclconfig}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {aclconfig}
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'tcp,reg1=0x.*/0xffff,nw_dst=1.2.3.6 actions=drop' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
pid1=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
kill $pid1
sleep 1
ovs-vswitchd --enable-dummy=override --disable-system --detach --no-chdir --pidfile --log-file -vvconn -vofproto_dpif -vunixctl
sleep 1
pid2=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
if test $pid1 -eq $pid2; then
    exit 2
na-ctl nwfilter update {aclconfig}
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'tcp,reg1=0x.*/0xffff,nw_dst=1.2.3.6 actions=drop' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=2
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'tcp,reg1=0x.*/0xffff,nw_dst=1.2.3.6 actions=drop' br0_flows2.txt
if test $? -ne 1; then
    exit 4
acl_config)
Z	aclconfig
nwfilterdirr
z-test restart acl failed: shell return code:%d)
nwfilter_dirr
test_restart_aclM
Dz#TestProcessRestart.test_restart_aclc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
fw_by_add_config_fw_default() {{
    cat <<EOF
<filter name='fw_config' chain='mac_fw' priority='-800'>
  <uuid>15fdfa87-ce43-4402-9927-3f6f74524691</uuid>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='in' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='drop' direction='out' priority='4' statematch='true'>
    <all-ipv6/>
  </rule>
  <rule action='accept' direction='out' priority='10' statematch='true'>
    <tcp srcipaddr='1.2.3.5' srcipmask='32'/>
  </rule>
</filter>
fw_by_add_config_fw_default > {nwfilterdir}/{fwconfig}.xml
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={fwconfig}"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter={fwconfig}
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl nwfilter update {fwconfig}
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows.txt
grep 'ct_state=+new-est,tcp,.*,nw_src=1.2.3.5 actions=ct(commit),output:NXM_NX_REG1\[0..15\]' br0_flows.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
pid1=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
kill $pid1
sleep 1
ovs-vswitchd --enable-dummy=override --disable-system --detach --no-chdir --pidfile --log-file -vvconn -vofproto_dpif -vunixctl
sleep 1
pid2=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
if test $pid1 -eq $pid2; then
    exit 2
na-ctl nwfilter update {fwconfig}
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows1.txt
grep 'ct_state=+new-est,tcp,.*,nw_src=1.2.3.5 actions=ct(commit),output:NXM_NX_REG1\[0..15\]' br0_flows1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=2 --event="remove Interface p1 other_config:nwfilter"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 other_config nwfilter
na-ctl wait --id=2
ovs-ofctl dump-flows br0 > br0_flows2.txt
grep 'ct_state=+new-est,tcp,.*,nw_src=1.2.3.5 actions=ct(commit),output:NXM_NX_REG1\[0..15\]' br0_flows2.txt
if test $? -ne 1; then
    exit 4
Z	fw_config)
fwconfigTr
z,test restart fw failed: shell return code:%d)
test_restart_fw
Dz"TestProcessRestart.test_restart_fwc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=secure --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy --     add-port br0 p2 -- set interface p2 ofport_request=2 type=dummy
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
NETFILENAME="qos_test"
ADDR1=1.1.0.1
ADDRD=1.1.0.2
get_netfile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" uuid="245324" version="1">
<flow direction="in" dl_type="ip" nw_dst="$ADDR1/24" nw_proto="icmp" priority="15">
<action burst="2" domain="interface" id="5" rate="1" unit="kbps" />
</flow>
</netprofile>
na-ctl --retry=-1 netprofile define --content "$(get_netfile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 1
PRTNAME="6cecd756-a718-4ed6-9679-a19c38461d42_1"
get_portprofile() {{
    cat <<EOF
<portprofile name="$PRTNAME" type="compose">
  <netprofile name="$NETFILENAME" type="qos" />
</portprofile>
na-ctl portprofile define --content "$(get_portprofile)"
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
na-ctl add-listen --id=2 --event="set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile=$PRTNAME
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 3
na-ctl wait --id=2  # so net-agentd knows the configuration
# Strips out uninteresting parts of flow output, as well as parts
# that vary from one run to another (e.g., timing and bond actions).
strip_timers() {{
    sed '
    s/duration:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/duration:0.0/
    s/used:[0-9]*\.[0-9]*/used:0.0/
ovs-appctl time/warp 5000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
# with burst size 2 (== 2000 bits). 4 packets, (240 bytes == 1920 bits) pass, but the last packet should hit the drop band.
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
meter:2 flow_count:1 packet_in_count:5 byte_in_count:300 duration:0.0s bands:
0: packet_count:1 byte_count:60
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 4
pid1=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
kill -9 $pid1
sleep 1
ovs-vswitchd --enable-dummy=override --disable-system --detach --no-chdir --pidfile --log-file -vvconn -vofproto_dpif -vunixctl
sleep 1
pid2=$(cat ovs-vswitchd.pid)
if test $pid1 -eq $pid2; then
    exit 5
ovs-appctl time/warp 10000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats1.txt
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected.txt meterstats1.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 6
na-ctl add-listen --id=13 --event="remove Interface p1 external_ids:port-profile"
ovs-vsctl remove Interface p1 external_ids port-profile
na-ctl wait --id=13
ovs-appctl time/warp 10000
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
ovs-appctl netdev-dummy/receive p1 "in_port(1),packet_type(ns=0,id=0),eth(src=50:54:00:00:00:0a,dst=50:54:00:00:00:0b),eth_type(0x0800),ipv4(src=$ADDR1,dst=$ADDRD,proto=1,tos=0,ttl=64,frag=no),icmp(type=8,code=0)" --len 60
(ovs-ofctl -O OpenFlow13 meter-stats br0 | strip_timers) > meterstats2.txt
cat <<EOF > meterstats_expected1.txt
OFPST_METER reply (OF1.3) (xid=0x2):
diff --ignore-all-space meterstats_expected1.txt meterstats2.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 7
z-test restart qos failed: shell return code:%d)
check_meter_testr
test_qos_restart
tz#TestProcessRestart.test_qos_restart)	
__name__
__module__
__qualname__r
__classcell__r
__main__)	Z
unittestZ
na_tests.common.utilityr
na_tests.commonr
TestCaseBaser
mainr
<module>
